text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, it's time for the summer camp. Like
the self-proclaimed outlaw she is, Vodka passes
the bus on motorcycle and arrives at camp before
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch on to a ruse though, and find out that
she's hitched a ride on her dad's bike to look
cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So begins yet another summer camp for this
show-off!
